text: {"verdicts": [{"commitment_id": 1, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Daniel Cho confirmed Cirrus Analytics acquisition closed 'on schedule in the final week of fiscal Q3, exactly as we committed.'", "commitment_id": 1}, {"commitment_id": 2, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}, {"commitment_id": 3, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas reaffirmed full-year non-GAAP operating margin at approximately 19 percent, consistent with updated guidance, but FY2026 is not yet complete."}, {"commitment_id": 4, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Helena Vargas explicitly stated GAAP operating income will be 'slightly negative for fiscal 2026, in the range of negative 25 to negative 40 million dollars' and acknowledged the missed commitment."}, {"commitment_id": 5, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Daniel Cho reaffirmed native Cirrus query capabilities GA target remains end of fiscal Q4 2026; deadline has not yet arrived."}, {"commitment_id": 6, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}, {"commitment_id": 7, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Daniel Cho explicitly stated 'we are not going to hit the end of fiscal Q4 2026 GA target for Stratus Copilot,' now expected in fiscal Q2 2027."}, {"commitment_id": 8, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas said EMEA is improving and mid-single-digit Q4 growth is 'increasingly confident' but achievable, deadline not yet arrived."}, {"commitment_id": 9, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas reaffirmed expectation to 'fully exhaust the 500 million dollar authorisation by the end of fiscal 2026'; deadline not yet arrived."}, {"commitment_id": 10, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}]}
